title: Original Shapeless Book Recipe
description: This is more like the modern recipes because it is shapeless but classic because it only requires paper, no leather.
body:
# Original Shapeless Book Recipe

This is just a simple recipe data pack, nothing special.

The recipe was changed with the Release 1.3.1 update.

Just take 3 pieces of paper and fashion them however you'd like insane any crafting table to get a book.

**Side Note**: The game will most likely tell you that the data pack is out of data depending on the version you are choosing to play but it works just fine 1.13-1.20

![shapeless recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e2c896cffeb84ea74cef0ea870bc1d3313a5da8.png)
